headline: Robinhood Partners dYdX Labs on $1B Arcus DEX

headline: Quantum Systems Valuation Soars to $8 Billion

article.title: Quantum Systems More Than Doubles Valuation to $8 Billion
article.summary: Quantum Systems has raised $1.2 billion in a funding round, more than doubling the German drone startup’s valuation to about $8 billion post-money, in the latest example of investors’ enthusiasm for defense-related bets.

headline: Japan Retail Investors Buy $1B Stocks Amid Selloff
